stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true if a discrepancy occurs between the on-board navigation database and the published procedure?

options.a: An RNP APCH may be flown with clearance from ATC.
options.b: An RNP APCH may be flown to higher minima.
options.c: The Commander may decide whether an RNP APCH is possible.
options.d: Pilots must not fly an RNP APCH.
